{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Imperial clerk
| introduced = cradle-05-ghostwater
}}

== Ghostwater ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|The [[Imperial clerk]] is a [[Truegold]] woman of seventy.<ref name="cradle-05-ghostwater-c4">''Ghostwater'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Ghostwater]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
